caption:
Welcome the next bank holiday with the unmissable 1 AM ranchera song🎤🎶

This is the chance to experience Mexican sound in one place 📍 from sizzling reggaeton, to salsa sabrosa, guaracha, electro-cumbia, and more 🇲🇽🇲🇽🔥

All served by DJs Pahua, Mao Skaa, Ritmos Cholulteka + Kandela Bone Machina and Disco Psicodélico

Powered by Suena Bien soundsystem, specially designed for cumbia and tropical rhythms with speakers that look as great as they sound💣🔊

SUENABIEN SOUNDSYSTEM FIESTA🎉
👉🏽3 MAY
👉🏽@hackney_bridge 
👉🏽Tickets on DICE / RA
